Meta.defaultDescription: Modern cuisine with an Asian twist on the harbour of Oud-Beijerland. Lunch, dinner, business lunch and private dining.

Home.heroLead: A modern restaurant with world dishes, often with an Asian twist. Welcome to our table.
Home.introBody: Restaurant Oostkade sits on the harbour of Oud-Beijerland. Since 2022 chef Yorick Schaeffer is at the helm. Our kitchen blends classic technique with world flavours, often with an Asian twist. Fresh produce, honest cooking, and an atmosphere that fits every moment, from business lunch to dinner with friends.
Home.highlight1Body: 2, 3 or 4 courses from €29. With wine pairing from €14. Designed for productive afternoons.
Home.highlight2Body: Room for 120 guests. Birthdays, corporate events, bespoke catering. We make it memorable.
Home.highlight3Body: Terrace overlooking the water. Our favourite spot in summer, cosy inside in winter.
Home.ctaStripBody: Reserve online or call us directly.
Home.socialBody: Follow us on Instagram for the latest news, specials and behind-the-scenes glimpses from the kitchen and the terrace.

Impressions.title: A look inside
Impressions.lead: A quick glimpse of the kitchen, the terrace and the atmosphere at Oostkade.

hugo.body: Pleasantly surprised by the quality of the food. A great combination of flavours and dishes that looked and tasted quite unique.

jvb.body: Amazing place. Such a good, exciting menu, super wines, cocktails and a beautiful terrace.

petra.body: Everything was incredibly delicious and the service was fantastic. The timing between courses was spot on and the team was super friendly, even to our 80-year-old parents.

susanne.body: A wonderful, first-class dinner. Each of the five courses was tasty, varied and beautifully presented. Stylish, modern and sophisticated yet still cosy.

rob.body: We always go for the surprise menu and it never disappoints. Great value for money, generously filled plates, and a delicious dessert. Worth repeating.

ate.body: Fantastic menu, wonderful flavours and a lovely atmosphere. The surprise menu is highly recommended, and the location is fantastic.

arie.body: A fantastic culinary experience on the outdoor terrace. Cones with tuna, tacos with sea bass, an oyster PS Martini, and a great drinks menu to match.

martijn.body: We had dinner with 18 people at a long table and everything was perfectly organised. Delicious food served all at once, excellent service, and a great atmosphere inside and out.

lieke.body: You feel the good energy the moment you walk in. Hip, modern decor with real attention to detail. The cocktails are fantastic — the place for a fun night out.

rosalie.body: Truly one of my favourites. Great service, welcoming staff, and food that always makes me happy. The new owner is super creative and doing a great job.

Menu.title: Menu
Menu.lead: Our menu changes with the seasons. Ask our team about the specials of the week.
Menu.note: Got an allergy? Please let us know!

Drinks.title: Drinks menu
Drinks.lead: Our drinks list with wines, beers, cocktails, mocktails and house specials. Ask our team for a recommendation.
Drinks.note: Looking for something special? Ask about our wine specials.

Lunch.title: Lunch and business lunch
Lunch.lead: Quick, polished, and always on time. From a rustic sandwich menu to a full 4-course meal.
Lunch.businessBody: Our business lunch is designed for productive afternoons. Pick 2, 3 or 4 courses, optionally with a matching wine pairing.
Lunch.casualBody: Our lunch menu offers rustic sandwiches, flatbreads and salads with fresh, seasonal ingredients. Dinner dishes are also available at lunch.

Events.title: Events & business meetings
Events.lead: Got something to celebrate? We would love to welcome you at Restaurant Oostkade in Oud-Beijerland.
Events.introBody: Whether you are planning a birthday, anniversary, wedding or a business meeting, Oostkade is the right venue for both small and large groups. Enjoy our flavourful dishes and extensive drinks list in our beautiful location on the harbour of Oud-Beijerland.
Events.capacityBody: We can arrange our atmospheric restaurant and spacious terrace overlooking the harbour entirely to your wishes. The whole restaurant or a private section — we tailor it to suit you.
Events.cateringBody: Prefer a party or dinner at your own location? Our kitchen will come to you. From private dining to full-service catering, we are happy to think along with you.
Events.menusBody: Sharing dining, walking dinner, or a classic five-course menu. Everything is possible. Together we create an unforgettable experience.
Events.planBody: We would love to hear about your plans. Send us an email or call us directly and we'll be in touch within 48 hours to discuss the possibilities together.
Events.inquireBody: Send us an email and we'll get back within 48 hours.

Reservations.title: Reserve a table
Reservations.lead: Booking is easy via the Zenchef button at the bottom right of the page. Pick your date, time and number of guests — you'll receive an email confirmation right away.
Reservations.widgetBody: Click the booking button at the bottom right of the page to reserve your table. Pick a date, time and number of guests in a few clicks.
Reservations.groupsBody: For larger groups or special requests, please call us directly on 0186-617170 or email info@restaurantoostkade.nl.

form.name: Name
form.successBody: You'll receive an email confirmation within minutes.

Reservations.phoneBody: Call us on 0186-617170. We're available during opening hours.
